data.title: EWR Digital detected impersonation attempt on cloned website, reaffirming its commitment to LLM Visibility™ and AI Discoverability Framework™.
data.description: On October 2, 2025, EWR Digital, a prominent national digital growth consultancy based in Houston, revealed the discovery and reporting of an online impersonation scheme. This involved a cloned website utilizing the company's name, aiming to deceive visitors and divert authority. EWR Digital uncovered the fraudulent domain and took appropriate action.

data.title: Katana raises €14 million in Series B extension with Cogito Capital Partners as lead investor, joined by Benchmark's Peter Fenton.
data.description: Estonia-based Katana revealed today that it has secured an additional €14 million in funding as an extension of its Series B round. The investment was spearheaded by Cogito Capital Partners.

data.title: Zurich North America partners with Certificial to automate COI issuance, leading to 50% faster renewal processing.
data.description: In New York, Certificial revealed that Zurich North America has integrated Certificial’s platform to streamline Certificates of Insurance (COI) for its Property & Casualty divisions. By implementing this platform, manual data entry has been eliminated, reducing Errors & Omissions risk and improving service for policyholders and certificate holders. Initial findings from Zurich North America indicate that complex renewal packages are processed more than 50% faster within a few months of implementation. The program is progressing successfully with a goal to eradicate manual processes.

data.title: Dow rises as jobless data suspended due to government shutdown; Tesla stock surges on strong Q3 deliveries.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index increased amid the suspension of economic data due to the government shutdown. Tesla stock saw a significant rise following strong third-quarter deliveries. The Dow dropped as jobless data was removed from consideration.

data.title: Brunswick Corp to release 2025 Q3 results on Oct 23; full text online.
data.description: Brunswick Corporation (NYSE: BC) from Mettawa, Illinois announced that it will unveil its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 on October 23, 2025. The results will be disclosed before the market opens on that day through an advisory release. Interested parties can access the complete results on the company’s website at https://ir.brunswick.com. In addition to this, the results will also be accessible on the SEC’s website through the Form 8-K filing associated with the release. This initiative aims to provide transparency to stakeholders and investors regarding the company’s performance and financial standing.

data.title: Montero Mining secures option to acquire Elvira and Potrero Gold Projects in Chile's Maricunga Belt, famous for its mining activity.
data.description: Montero Mining and Exploration Ltd. (TSX-V: MON) (OTCPK: MXTRF) announced on Oct. 2, 2025, that its subsidiary, Minera Joy SpA, has secured two option agreements to obtain 100% ownership of the Elvira Gold Project and the Potrero Gold Project in Chile’s Maricunga Belt. This region is known for significant mining operations such as Kinross’ La Coipa mine, Gold Fields’ Salares Norte mine, and Rio2’s Fenix gold project. The agreements mark a significant development for Montero in expanding its portfolio in the area.

data.title: Trump maintains stable approval ratings despite controversial policies, as shown in latest NYT survey.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the number of new COVID-19 cases has reached a record high of 10,000 in the last 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of cases in the country to 250,000. Additionally, the death toll has also risen to 5,000, with 100 new fatalities reported. The government has announced new restrictions and guidelines to curb the spread of the virus, including mask mandates and limits on gatherings. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to these measures to protect themselves and others from the ongoing pandemic.

data.title: AorticLab's FLOWer™ System gets FDA approval for clinical investigation, marking a milestone in medical innovation.
data.description: In Torino, Italy, on October 2, 2025, AorticLab revealed that the Investigational Device Exemption (IDE) for the FLOWer™ System pivotal clinical study has been authorized by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA). The FLOWer System, a revolutionary full-body embolic technology, has garnered approval for further development and testing.

data.title: 70% of women aged 35-54 report menopause affects mood, but only 30% seek support. - Business Wire
data.description: A recent survey conducted among women aged 35-54 in the U.S. unveiled that 70% of participants experience menopause symptoms that impact their mood or mental health. However, only 30% have actively sought assistance for these issues. Commissioned by OLLY, a pioneering wellness brand focusing on beneficial supplements, and in collaboration with Carrot, a worldwide fertility and family care platform, the survey was carried out in partnership with Ipsos. The study sheds light on the prevalence of menopause-related challenges among women in this age group and highlights the gap in seeking support for such issues.

data.title: Kantata announces winners of 2025 Catalyst Awards for professional services excellence and innovation in London & Irvine.
data.description: A provider of PSA solutions, Kantata, recently announced the recipients of its Catalyst awards in London and Irvine, California. These awards aim to acknowledge exceptional professionals in the industry and their significant contributions.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims on behalf of V.F. Corporation investors who suffered losses between Oct 30, 2023 - May 20, 2025. Contact James Wilson for legal rights discussion.
data.description: If you are an investor who experienced losses in VFC between October 30, 2023, and May 20, 2025, Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging you to reach out to him directly. By contacting him, you can discuss your options and legal rights related to this matter. For further assistance, call the provided contact number.

data.title: Global AV technology pioneer Peerless-AV® now offers universal substructures worldwide, along with dvLED wall mounts. Revit models boost project design efficiency.
data.description: In Aurora, Illinois, on October 2, 2025, Peerless-AV®, a renowned global AV technology leader, introduced dvLED wall mounts and advanced substructures. These innovations offer enhanced durability, versatility, and simplified installation processes. With the release of exclusive parametric Revit models, project design and specification have been significantly expedited. This development aims to streamline the integration of AV solutions, providing ease and efficiency.

data.title: Carta Healthcare is a finalist in Best Use of AI in Healthcare at the 2025 A.I. Awards. #AI #healthcare #finalist.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 2, 2025, Carta Healthcare, a top provider of AI-driven clinical data abstraction solutions, has been recognized as a finalist in the 2025 A.I. Awards for their exceptional use of AI in healthcare. The prestigious honor is awarded by the cloud computing awards organization.
